response.justification: Strong technical fundamentals and proven leadership across major companies, but lacks demonstrated expertise in the role's core focus area. Resume shows no evidence of building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or metrics/telemetry systems—capabilities essential for a Principal-level growth and experimentation systems role. Domain specialization gap is too significant for this narrowly-focused position.
strengths: 17 years of proven technical depth with consistent progression to staff/principal level at Google, Meta, and other scaled organizations
Proven ability to architect and ship foundational systems and infrastructure (microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec, pricing platforms at Meta, open-source GIS platform)
Strong mentorship track record through senior roles, technical talks, workshops, and open-source contributions demonstrating communication and teaching ability
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, or feature-flagging systems—the central focus of this role
Absence of metrics, telemetry, statistical analysis, or data science collaboration background; unclear foundation for the required 'high data aptitude'
Career shows breadth across many domains rather than depth in growth engineering or experimentation infrastructure; no evidence of translating business hypotheses into experimental design
